LiteralValue.description:
A typed RDF literal.

Exactly one of ``datatype`` or ``lang`` may be set; setting both is invalid.
LiteralValue.title: LiteralValue

Prefix.description: Declares ``PREFIX prefix: <iri>`` for the rendered query.
Prefix.title: Prefix

PrefixedName.description: A ``prefix:local`` reference. Resolved against the plan's prefix map.
PrefixedName.title: PrefixedName

Projection.description:
A single projection item.

Either ``var`` (project variable as-is) or ``expression`` + ``alias``
(project the value of ``expression`` AS ``alias``).
Projection.title: Projection

PropertyPathTerm.description: Atomic predicate IRI in a property path. Optionally inverted with ``^``.
PropertyPathTerm.title: PropertyPathTerm

ServicePattern.description: ``SERVICE <ep> { ... }``. Off by default; the validator gates it.
ServicePattern.title: ServicePattern

SubqueryPattern.description: A nested SELECT subquery in pattern position.
SubqueryPattern.title: SubqueryPattern

TriplePattern.description:
A basic triple pattern. ``predicate`` may be an IRI or a property path.

Subject and object cannot be property paths; the :data:`RdfTerm`
discriminated union enforces that.
TriplePattern.title: TriplePattern
